90 private void ModifyEntriesThatNeedIt_NameOverride(int npcID, string newNameKey)
91 {
92 BestiaryEntry bestiaryEntry = this.FindEntryByNPCID(npcID);
93 bestiaryEntry.Info.RemoveAll((IBestiaryInfoElement x) => x is NamePlateInfoElement);
94 bestiaryEntry.Info.Add(new NamePlateInfoElement(newNameKey, npcID));
95 bestiaryEntry.Icon = new UnlockableNPCEntryIcon(npcID, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0f, newNameKey);
96 }

471 // Token: 0x06002800 RID: 10240 RVA: 0x0056AE24 File Offset: 0x00569024
472 private void HideStats(NPCStatsReportInfoElement element)
473 {
474 element.HideStats = true;
475 }
476
477 // Token: 0x06002801 RID: 10241 RVA: 0x0056AE2D File Offset: 0x0056902D
478 private void AdjustEaterOfWorldStats(NPCStatsReportInfoElement element)
479 {
480 element.LifeMax *= NPC.GetEaterOfWorldsSegmentsCount();
481 }
482
483 // Token: 0x06002802 RID: 10242 RVA: 0x0056AE44 File Offset: 0x00569044
484 private void AdjustPirateShipStats(NPCStatsReportInfoElement element)
485 {
486 NPC npc = new NPC();
487 int num = 4;
488 npc.SetDefaults(492, new NPCSpawnParams
489 {
490 playerCountForMultiplayerDifficultyOverride = new int?(1)
491 });
492 element.LifeMax = num * npc.lifeMax;
493 }
494
495 // Token: 0x06002803 RID: 10243 RVA: 0x0056AE88 File Offset: 0x00569088
496 private void TryGivingEntryFlavorTextIfItIsMissing(BestiaryEntry entry)
497 {
498 if (entry.Info.Any((IBestiaryInfoElement x) => x is FlavorTextBestiaryInfoElement))
499 {
500 return;
501 }
502 SpawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement = null;
503 int? num = null;
504 foreach (IBestiaryInfoElement bestiaryInfoElement in entry.Info)
505 {
506 BestiaryPortraitBackgroundProviderPreferenceInfoElement bestiaryPortraitBackgroundProviderPreferenceInfoElement = bestiaryInfoElement as BestiaryPortraitBackgroundProviderPreferenceInfoElement;
507 if (bestiaryPortraitBackgroundProviderPreferenceInfoElement != null)
508 {
509 SpawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement2 = bestiaryPortraitBackgroundProviderPreferenceInfoElement.GetPreferredProvider() as SpawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement;
510 if (spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement2 != null)
511 {
512 spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement = spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement2;
513 break;
514 }
515 }
516 SpawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement3 = bestiaryInfoElement as SpawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement;
517 if (spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement3 != null)
518 {
519 int displayTextPriority = spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement3.DisplayTextPriority;
520 if (num != null)
521 {
522 int num2 = displayTextPriority;
523 int? num3 = num;
524 if (!((num2 >= num3.GetValueOrDefault()) & (num3 != null)))
525 {
526 continue;
527 }
528 }
529 spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement = spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement3;
530 num = new int?(displayTextPriority);
531 }
532 }
533 if (spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement == null)
534 {
535 return;
536 }
537 string displayNameKey = spawnConditionBestiaryInfoElement.GetDisplayNameKey();
538 string text = "Bestiary_BiomeText.biome_";
539 string text2 = displayNameKey.Substring(displayNameKey.IndexOf('.') + 1);
540 text += text2;
541 entry.Info.Add(new FlavorTextBestiaryInfoElement(text));
542 }
543
544 // Token: 0x06002804 RID: 10244 RVA: 0x0056AFB0 File Offset: 0x005691B0

559 this.Register(BestiaryEntry.TownNPC(160));

589 // Token: 0x06002805 RID: 10245 RVA: 0x0056B244 File Offset: 0x00569444
590 private void AddMultiEntryNPCS_Manual()
591 {
592 this.Register(BestiaryEntry.Enemy(85)).Icon = new UnlockableNPCEntryIcon(85, 0f, 0f, 0f, 3f, null);
593 }
594
595 // Token: 0x06002806 RID: 10246 RVA: 0x0056B274 File Offset: 0x00569474
596 private void AddEmptyEntries_CrittersAndEnemies_Automated()
597 {
598 HashSet<int> exclusions = BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.GetExclusions();
599 foreach (KeyValuePair<int, NPC> keyValuePair in ContentSamples.NpcsByNetId)
600 {
601 if (!exclusions.Contains(keyValuePair.Key) && !keyValuePair.Value.isLikeATownNPC)
602 {
603 if (keyValuePair.Value.CountsAsACritter)
604 {
605 this.Register(BestiaryEntry.Critter(keyValuePair.Key));
606 }
607 else
608 {
609 this.Register(BestiaryEntry.Enemy(keyValuePair.Key));
610 }
611 }
612 }
613 }
614
615 // Token: 0x06002807 RID: 10247 RVA: 0x0056B318 File Offset: 0x00569518
616 private static HashSet<int> GetExclusions()
617 {
618 HashSet<int> hashSet = new HashSet<int>();
619 List<int> list = new List<int>();
620 foreach (KeyValuePair<int, NPCID.Sets.NPCBestiaryDrawModifiers> keyValuePair in NPCID.Sets.NPCBestiaryDrawOffset)
621 {
622 if (keyValuePair.Value.Hide)
623 {
624 list.Add(keyValuePair.Key);
625 }
626 }
627 foreach (int num in list)
628 {
629 hashSet.Add(num);
630 }
631 return hashSet;
632 }
633

1775
1776 // Token: 0x0600280A RID: 10250 RVA: 0x00571A90 File Offset: 0x0056FC90
1777 private void AddNPCBiomeRelationships_AddDecorations_Automated()
1778 {
1779 foreach (KeyValuePair<int, NPC> keyValuePair in ContentSamples.NpcsByNetId)
1780 {
1781 BestiaryEntry bestiaryEntry = this.FindEntryByNPCID(keyValuePair.Key);
1782 if (bestiaryEntry.Info.Contains(BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Events.Rain))
1783 {
1784 if (bestiaryEntry.Info.Contains(BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Biomes.Snow))
1785 {
1786 bestiaryEntry.AddTags(new IBestiaryInfoElement[] { BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Visuals.Blizzard });
1787 }
1788 else
1789 {
1790 bestiaryEntry.AddTags(new IBestiaryInfoElement[] { BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Visuals.Rain });
1791 }
1792 }
1793 else
1794 {
1795 if (bestiaryEntry.Info.Contains(BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Events.Eclipse))
1796 {
1797 bestiaryEntry.AddTags(new IBestiaryInfoElement[] { BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Visuals.EclipseSun });
1798 }
1799 if (bestiaryEntry.Info.Contains(BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Times.NightTime))
1800 {
1801 bestiaryEntry.AddTags(new IBestiaryInfoElement[] { BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Visuals.Moon });
1802 }
1803 if (bestiaryEntry.Info.Contains(BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Times.DayTime))
1804 {
1805 bestiaryEntry.AddTags(new IBestiaryInfoElement[] { BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Visuals.Sun });
1806 }
1807 if (bestiaryEntry.Info.Contains(BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Invasions.PumpkinMoon))
1808 {
1809 bestiaryEntry.AddTags(new IBestiaryInfoElement[] { BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Visuals.PumpkinMoon });
1810 }
1811 if (bestiaryEntry.Info.Contains(BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Invasions.FrostMoon))
1812 {
1813 bestiaryEntry.AddTags(new IBestiaryInfoElement[] { BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Visuals.FrostMoon });
1814 }
1815 if (bestiaryEntry.Info.Contains(BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Biomes.Meteor))
1816 {
1817 bestiaryEntry.AddTags(new IBestiaryInfoElement[] { BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Visuals.Moon });
1818 bestiaryEntry.AddTags(new IBestiaryInfoElement[] { BestiaryDatabaseNPCsPopulator.CommonTags.SpawnConditions.Visuals.Meteor });
1819 }
1820 }
1821 }
1822 }
1823
1824 // Token: 0x0600280B RID: 10251 RVA: 0x00571C4C File Offset: 0x0056FE4C
1825 public void AddDropOverrides(BestiaryDatabase bestiaryDatabase)
1826 {
1827 this.FindEntryByNPCID(121).Info.AddRange(this.FindEntryByNPCID(81).Info.OfType<ItemDropBestiaryInfoElement>());
1828 }
